title: High-risk decision without proof gate
summary: This fixture is structurally valid JSON Schema but should fail custom graph-rule tests because high-risk decisions need a proof gate or workflow check edge.

source_anchors.section: Verification rules that should fail the build

verification: Expected custom graph rule failure: high-risk decision has no checked_by or validated_by proof gate edge.
negative_consequences: Would be unsafe if accepted without proof gate.
